title: DogReborn
body:
### Dog Reborn:

This mod gives you the ability to save your beautiful dog from death!

### HOW:

- Tame your doggy and the message will show with the item described in the config file.
- Give that item to your dog to increase the number of lives that the dog has.
- When killed the dog will be teleported to your spawn point.
- The max number of lives is defined in the config file.
 

### Configs:

- Max Lives - the max number of lives per dog (default is 5)
- Item Registry Name - The item registry name (default is minecraft:diamond)
